items.title: Open models will largely lose if they keep chasing closed frontier AI models; instead, open models should serve as complementary tools to closed agents (Nathan Lambert/Interconnects AI)
items.title_original: Open models will largely lose if they keep chasing closed frontier AI models; instead, open models should serve as complementary tools to closed agents (Nathan Lambert/Interconnects AI)
items.title_en: Open models will largely lose if they keep chasing closed frontier AI models; instead, open models should serve as complementary tools to closed agents (Nathan Lambert/Interconnects AI)
items.title_zh: 如果开放模型继续追逐封闭的前沿人工智能模型，那么它们将在很大程度上失败；相反，开放模型应该作为封闭代理的补充工具（Nathan Lambert/Interconnects AI）
items.title_bilingual: 如果开放模型继续追逐封闭的前沿人工智能模型，那么它们将在很大程度上失败；相反，开放模型应该作为封闭代理的补充工具（Nathan Lambert/Interconnects AI） / Open models will largely lose if they keep chasing closed frontier AI models; instead, open models should serve as complementary tools to closed agents (Nathan Lambert/Interconnects AI)
